name: Patient Case
history: Relationships sometimes shift into romantic connections. Past conflict in relationships following expressions of anger. Complex relationship with parents involving obligations.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I express my true feelings, I will be rejected.
intermediate_belief_depression: I must keep my emotions in check to maintain relationships.
coping_strategies: Avoids expressing anger to prevent conflict.
situation: An incident at a social gathering resulted in an emotional outburst among friends.
auto_thought: I shouldn't have let my emotions get the better of me; now they will reject me.
behavior: Attempts to apologize and smooth over the situation to avoid rejection.
